ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used to acquire the data */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the data was acquired */,
  "geospatial_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the dataset */,
  "spatial_resolution" REAL /* Spatial resolution of the dataset */,
  "spectral_resolution" REAL /* Spectral resolution of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the band belongs to */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the band */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band */,
  "band_description" TEXT /* Description of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bands_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pixels" (
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pixel */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the band the pixel belongs to */,
  "pixel_value" REAL /* Value of the pixel */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the pixel */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the pixel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pixel */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pixel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pixel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pixels_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gray_values" (
  "gray_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gray value */,
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pixel */,
  "gray_value" REAL /* Gray value of the pixel */,
  "gray_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the gray value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gray_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gray_values_pixel_id FOREIGN KEY ("pixel_id") REFERENCES pixels ("pixel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "white_values" (
  "white_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each white value */,
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pixel */,
  "white_value" REAL /* White value of the pixel */,
  "white_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the white value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("white_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_white_values_pixel_id FOREIGN KEY ("pixel_id") REFERENCES pixels ("pixel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bg_values" (
  "bg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each background value */,
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pixel */,
  "bg_value" INTEGER /* Background value of the pixel */,
  "bg_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the background value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bg_values_pixel_id FOREIGN KEY ("pixel_id") REFERENCES pixels ("pixel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaf_values" (
  "leaf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaf value */,
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pixel */,
  "leaf_value" REAL /* Leaf value of the pixel */,
  "leaf_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the leaf value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaf_values_pixel_id FOREIGN KEY ("pixel_id") REFERENCES pixels ("pixel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "requester" TEXT /* Requester's name */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
